title: DAY ROOM - 211info
text: MEN'S MISSION DAY ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in day center focused on health care. Services include OHP navigation, onsite mental and physical health services, and primary physican care. 777 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 973010431 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (503) 362-3983 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 362-3983 Main phone (503) 399-8673 FAX Main phone (503) 362-3983 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of Commercial and Center Streets. Accessible via Salem Mass Transit Bus 1. Enter through the large double doors at the courtyard on the south side of the building. Services: Homeless Drop In Centers * Health Issues Homeless Drop In Centers * Mental Health Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - MEALS HOUSING/SHELTER - MEN SHELTER MATERIAL GOODS - SHOWER FACILITIES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - FOOT CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEN'S MISSION
